founder.name: Ben Carter
founder.bio: Ex-hedge-fund analyst. Building a personal-finance copilot for retail investors.

company.name: Hedgehog
company.one_liner: Personal-finance copilot that explains your portfolio risk in plain language.

content.title: Show HN: Hedgehog - understand your portfolio risk in plain English
content.author: bencarter

content.note: Decent execution, ~1,200 waitlist signups, but consumer fintech distribution is brutal and regulatory exposure is unclear. Mixed.
